text.content:
Covenant Chronicle

Import this journal into your world, then link it from a Covenant actor (Notes → Chronicle Journal UUID). Keep mechanical state on the actor; use these pages for narrative and seasonal logs.

Identity

  • Name:
  • Location / site:
  • Tribunal:
  • Founded:
  • Stage: Spring / Summer / Autumn / Winter (maturity)

Charter

What binds the magi? Voting, guest rights, sharing of vis and books, who speaks for the covenant at Tribunal.

Hooks & Boons

Hooks — threats, mysteries, and obligations that drive the saga.
Boons — allies, privileges, and advantages tied to the site.

Table workflow

  1. Create a Covenant actor (Actors → Create → type Covenant).
  2. Fill aura, season, wealth, and vis on the actor sheet.
  3. Drop character actors onto the Members tab (or drop the covenant onto a character header).
  4. Paste this journal’s UUID into the covenant’s Chronicle field.

Aura

Record aura type (Magic / Faerie / Divine / Infernal) and level on the Covenant actor. Use this page for flavor: regio layers, boundaries, what strengthens or weakens the aura, and how visitors react.

Site notes

  • Mundane cover story / village relations
  • Approaches and defenses
  • Regio entrances and keys
  • Nearby supernatural neighbors

Wealth & income

Summarize prosperity on the actor (Wealth / Income). Here, track rents, tithes, trade, and seasonal shortfalls that might force magi into adventure.

Library

List summae and tractatus available to members (Arts and Abilities). Note quality, subject, and who may borrow without a vote. Mirror a short index on the Covenant actor’s Library field for quick reference.

Laboratories

Who has a personal lab? Shared space? Specializations, safety, and any enchanted devices that affect lab totals. Keep one-line summaries on the actor; expand details here.

Vis sources

Track stocks by Art on the Covenant actor. On this page, describe harvest sites, seasons, contested sources, and agreements with other covenants or hedge wizards.

Turb

Fighting companions, shields, and specialists who defend the covenant. Link named grogs as Character actors and drop them onto the covenant Members tab when they belong to the household.

Covenfolk

  • Autocrat / steward
  • Consors and specialists (blacksmith, scribe, healer…)
  • Servants and laborers
  • Loyalty, wages, and morale notes

Roster tip

Membership is stored on each character (covenantActor). The covenant Members tab lists everyone currently linked.

Current season

Set Season on the Covenant actor (Spring / Summer / Autumn / Winter). Use this page as the running log.

Template

Year: ____   Season: ____

  • Magus A: activity / advancement notes
  • Magus B:
  • Companions / grogs:
  • Covenant project: (building, harvest, Tribunal prep…)
  • Vis gained / spent:
  • Events:

Between sessions

After each seasonal resolution, update vis stocks and wealth on the Covenant actor, then append a short entry above.
